briefing.title: Evening Check-In
briefing.message: Coach data will appear here once your daily sync runs. Head to Settings to trigger a manual sync, or wait for the scheduled task to kick in.

todayWorkout.name: Upper Strength
todayWorkout.exercises: Bench 4x6-8, OHP 3x8-10, Rows 4x6-8, Face pulls 3x12, Arms 2x10-12
todayWorkout.prehab: Rotator cuff ext rotations 3x15, band pull-aparts 3x15
todayWorkout.note: Keep RPE 7-8. If shoulder feels tight, swap OHP for landmine press.

recovery.label: Moderate
recovery.message: Awaiting Garmin sync for accurate recovery data. Log your sleep and the coach will adjust recommendations.

insights.label: Setup
insights.text: Coach integration is live. Once the daily sync task runs, your Garmin data, workout plan, and AI coaching insights will appear here automatically.
